creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Plone 3.0 was released on 2007/08/21.
	http://plone.org/products/plone/releases/3.0

	It requires Zope 2.10.4 and Python 2.4.4.

	Plone-2.5.3 (www/plone) is intended to work with Zope-2.9.x
	(www/zope29), and upgrade or migration from Plone 2.5.3 and Zope
	2.9.x to Plone 3.0 + Zope 2.10.x is too hard (at least for me), so
	I created a new port.

Fix: uudecode, gunzip, and shar at /usr/ports. It will create
/usr/ports/www/plone3. I only tested "make install" and "make deinstall".
